chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.249 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 18.10.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Awan, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, APG. = I have heard learned counsel for applicant. He has challenged an order dated 11.03.2024 passed on application u/s 22-A & B Cr.P.C filed by respondent No.3. Learned counsel submits that dispute between the parties is of civil nature. Cheques issued by the applicant were in terms of guarantee. However, these facts need investigation. No illegality is found in the impugned order which has been supported by learned Addl. P.G. This application, therefore, is dismissed. J U D G E A.K
